results.title: Salman Khan's cryptic post DECODED; THIS is what actor meant[Video]
results.description: Salman Khan's cryptic "alone vs lonely" post sparked massive online speculation and fan concern. The actor later clarified it wasn't personal, revealing even his mother got worried after the reactions.

results.title: Meghan Markle suffers humiliating blow as failed speech proves 'it's over'
results.description: Megyn Kelly delivered a blistering attack on the Duchess.

results.title: Argos shoppers can get BBQ for £7 instead of £25 in clever deal stack
results.description: "Amazing value for money, easy to assemble, looks good quality, BBQs very well. Was easy to clean. Easy to move item when needed, very light to lift when needed."

results.title: Watch Viral Video: Salman Khan Loses Cool, Later Warns 'Haven't Forgotten How To Fight'
results.description: Salman Khan is making headlines once again, but this time it’s not because of a movie. A viral video showing the superstar losing his cool outside Mumbai’s Hinduja Hospital has taken over social media.Watch the video.
